## Why?

<!-- What problem does this solve, or what does it enable? -->

## Self-check (please tick all that apply)

- [ ] This does **not** add a new external dependency
- [ ] This does **not** change default output format or default CLI behavior
- [ ] This does **not** touch `run_command()` / the pty execution path
- [ ] This does **not** add any network call, telemetry, or "phone home" behavior
- [ ] If this touches ANSI/HTML conversion, I tested it against real tool output (nmap/nxc/gobuster/etc.) and included the output in this PR
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`

If you checked "does" instead of "does not" on any of the first four boxes, please open an issue to discuss the design before this gets reviewed — see `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
